title: IBM Cloud® Databases for Elasticsearch Gen 2
introduction: Elasticsearch Gen 2 combines the power of a full text search engine with the indexing strengths of a JSON document database on IBM's VPC-based platform with isolated compute and private endpoints.

links.title: Getting started with Databases for Elasticsearch Gen 2

section_highlights.title: IBM named a leader for cloud database management systems
section_highlights.description: Gartner named IBM a leader in Gartner Magic Quadrant for 2021 Cloud Database Management Systems.

section_highlights.title: IBM Training - Cloud
